title: salix × subsericea
intro: Salix × subsericea is a hybrid willow plant, a cross between the weeping willow (Salix babylonica) and the coyote willow (Salix exigua), known for its slender branches and silvery-green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Salix × subsericea include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestive health, and even help alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
